en-US.description:
Your MyTeslaMate data, finally readable from the couch. MyTeslaMate Viewer is the official mobile companion to MyTeslaMate.com — designed for subscribers who want to see their car and their history at a glance, without opening a browser.

Cockpit — Open the app and know in one second how your Tesla is doing right now. Battery level and remaining range, charging in progress with the estimated time it will be full, where the car is parked on a map, cabin and outside temperature, tire pressures (with a warning if one is low), and a heads-up when a new software update is waiting. A built-in battery-health card tells you how the pack is aging over time — capacity kept, range kept, real-world efficiency.

Drives — Every trip you have ever made, browsable by day, week, month or any custom range. Tap a drive to see the route on a map, how much energy it actually took, how efficient you were compared to the rated estimate, your average and top speed, and how the battery, speed and power evolved second by second.

Charges — Every charging session in one place: when, where, how much energy added, what it cost. A map at the top of the list shows all the spots you charged at in the selected period — useful to spot patterns or check what you spent on a trip.

Ask anything — A built-in AI assistant connected to your own data answers questions in plain language. "What did I spend on charging last month?", "What was my most efficient drive?", "Is my battery degrading?". Each screen also has a one-tap Recommendations button that hands the current view to the assistant for instant insights.

Made for daily use — Switch between cars if you own several. Available in English, French, German, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, Russian and Chinese. Light, dark or automatic theme.

Private by design — Your data stays between your MyTeslaMate instance and your phone, over HTTPS. No third-party analytics, no ad SDK, no tracking. Optional Face ID / Touch ID lock, with sign-in credentials kept in the iOS Keychain.

Open source — Full source code is on GitHub under GPLv3: https://github.com/MyTeslaMate/mobile

Good to know — The app requires an active MyTeslaMate.com account. It does not connect to or control your Tesla. Demo credentials for App Review are in the reviewer notes.

This application is not affiliated with or endorsed by Tesla, Inc.
en-US.promoText: The official mobile companion to MyTeslaMate.com. Live vehicle status, battery health, drive & charge history, AI assistant — your data on the go.
en-US.title: MyTeslaMate Viewer
en-US.subtitle: MyTeslaMate companion app

review.notes:
To sign in:
1. On the sign-in screen, tap "Sign in with a MyTeslaMate token".
2. Paste the demo token provided above (it has been entered as both the username and the password — copy from either field) into the token field.
3. Tap continue to load the demo vehicle data.

What makes this app distinct:
- It is the only mobile viewer for MyTeslaMate.com, the well-established Tesla data logger. Subscribers previously had to open a web browser to view their data; this app brings their full history natively to iPhone and iPad.
- A built-in AI assistant is connected to the user's own driving and charging history. It provides personalised insights and actionable recommendations on driving efficiency, charging habits, cost optimisation and battery health — directly from the user's data, in plain language.
- Every screen (Cockpit, Drives, Charges) has a one-tap "Recommendations" button that hands the current view to the assistant for instant context-aware advice.
- The app also surfaces battery health metrics (capacity kept, range kept, real-world efficiency over time) that are not available in the official Tesla app.
- All data stays between the user's own MyTeslaMate instance and their device over HTTPS — no third-party analytics, no ad SDK, no tracking.
